moves.name: Ribbon Cascade
moves.description: Leaps into a横向空翻, extending both legs into a wide split at peak height while whipping both arms overhead, the silk ribbons streaming upward in a radial burst, then lands on the balls of both feet with fists chambered at the hips.
moves.image_snapshot: Mid-air horizontal, body in full side split, legs extended to either side at shoulder height, both arms flung vertically overhead, ribbons whipping upward in a radial arc, torso upright. Motion blur on extended legs and ribbon trails.

moves.name: Silk Storm
moves.description: Unleashes a rapid five-hit combination: jab-cross-uppercut-hook-cross, each strike a precise snap with the white silk wraps, torso twisting sharply with each punch, shifting weight side to side in a tight stuttering advance.
moves.image_snapshot: Mid-combination, weight shifted onto bent right leg, left leg trailing at 45 degrees, right arm fully extended forward at shoulder height in a cross punch, left arm cocked at 90 degrees at the hip, torso twisted right. Speed lines on right fist and trailing left leg.

moves.name: Phantom Weave
moves.description: Drops into an extreme low crouch, then explodes upward in a spiraling corkscrew kick, body rotating 540 degrees, right leg extended in a scything arc overhead while left leg stays tucked, both arms spread wide in an X frame.
moves.image_snapshot: Mid-spin at 270 degrees rotation, body angled 45 degrees off vertical, right leg fully extended horizontally above head level, left leg bent with knee to chest, both arms spread in an X shape, hair buns whipping in the rotation. Motion blur on spinning torso and right leg arc.
